Comparative Analysis: Professor vs AI Model Evaluations¶

This notebook analyzes and compares student project evaluations from:

  • Professor (ground truth)
  • Claude Opus (most capable model)
  • Claude Sonnet (balanced model)
  • Claude Haiku (fastest model)

1. Data Loading & Cleaning¶

Total evaluations: 164
Unique projects: 41
Project types: ['noAI', 'onlyAI', 'hybrid']

9. Extreme Cases Analysis¶

Projects with Largest Disagreements (AI vs Professor):
======================================================================

Opus:
  Highest over-score: onlyAI_03 | Prof: 0.0 | Opus: 28.5 | Diff: +28.5
  Highest under-score: hybrid_14 | Prof: 95.0 | Opus: 54.0 | Diff: -41.0

Sonnet:
  Highest over-score: onlyAI_03 | Prof: 0.0 | Sonnet: 23.2 | Diff: +23.2
  Highest under-score: hybrid_12 | Prof: 80.0 | Sonnet: 21.0 | Diff: -59.0

Haiku:
  Highest over-score: noAI_08a | Prof: 45.0 | Haiku: 81.0 | Diff: +36.0
  Highest under-score: hybrid_12 | Prof: 80.0 | Haiku: 20.2 | Diff: -59.8

10. Key Findings Summary¶

======================================================================
KEY FINDINGS SUMMARY
======================================================================

1. SAMPLE SIZE
   - Total projects evaluated: 41
   - Project types: ['noAI', 'onlyAI', 'hybrid']

2. OVERALL SCORING PATTERNS
   - Professor average: 50.3
   - Opus average: 46.9 (-3.4 vs Professor)
   - Sonnet average: 42.8 (-7.6 vs Professor)
   - Haiku average: 51.8 (+1.4 vs Professor)

3. BEST PERFORMING AI MODEL
   - Highest correlation with Professor: Opus (r = 0.767)
   - Lowest Mean Absolute Error: Haiku (MAE = 13.91)

4. AGREEMENT RATES (within ±10 points)
   - Opus: 36.6%
   - Sonnet: 29.3%
   - Haiku: 56.1%

5. SCORING BIAS
   - Opus tends to score 3.4 points lower than Professor
   - Sonnet tends to score 7.6 points lower than Professor
   - Haiku tends to score 1.5 points higher than Professor

======================================================================

RECOMMENDATION:
--------------------------------------------------
Based on correlation, MAE, and bias analysis:
'Haiku' shows the best overall alignment with Professor evaluations.

Model scores (higher = better):
  Haiku: 0.800
  Opus: 0.785
  Sonnet: 0.725
